description: Assign uniform applied distributed load (force per unit length) to all beam elements in the range. Positive loads acts in the positive \(y\) - or \(z\) -directions ( f1 and f2 , respectively) of the element coordinate system and maintains this orientation during large-strain motion. Point loads are applied at the nodes using the command structure node apply .

9.0.syntax: structure beam apply <f1><f2>[range] only 1 component in 2D
